parts.name: MX-style mechanical switch (soldered, no hotswap)
parts.notes: Specific switch undecided; MX variant. Choc variant gets its own BOM minor bump.

parts.name: Keycap set covering the 59-key Alice layout
parts.notes: Needs Alice kit: 2.25u + 2.75u spacebars, 1.25u bottom mods. (Mirrored B dropped at LOG 17.)

parts.name: PCB-mount stabilizer, 2u class
parts.notes: Bksp 2u, Enter 2.25u, Shifts 2.25/2.75u, spacebars 2.25/2.75u — all take 2u-class wire.

parts.name: Matrix diode 1N4148W (SOD-123)
parts.notes: One per key; standard choice, pending schematic.

parts.name: Wireless MCU module (candidate: nRF52840)
parts.notes: BLE-only first take decided 2026-07-12 (dongle later if wanted). nRF52840 stands; XIAO nRF52840 and nice!nano v2 both proven with ZMK color displays (prospector/YADS).

parts.name: Center color display (candidates: ST7789 240x280 1.69", GC9A01 round 240x240)
parts.notes: Shortlist (LOG 15/17): 1.28in round GC9A01 glass-only through plate aperture (needs +0.85u split after right-B removal) vs 1.69in 240x280 ST7789 (+1.24u). Fit mockups design/renders/screenfit_*_iter17. Awaiting human pick.

parts.name: LiPo battery + charging path
parts.notes: Wireless confirmed BLE-first: pack is in. Big unibody floor fits 2000-5000 mAh; size after case envelope. Custom PCB carries a 500 mA+ charger IC (stock module chargers too slow for big packs).
